expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, and visible failure or recovery outcomes
expectations.evidence: The outputs state that Phase 5b checkpoint artifacts are missing and therefore the benchmark focus cannot be validated: “there are no Phase 5b runtime artifacts (e.g., `checkpoint_audit`, `checkpoint_delta`, `qa_plan_phase5b` draft) to validate whether the orchestrator/phase5b checkpoint output actually covers the case focus (panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, visible failure/recovery outcomes)” and later “This establishes the feature is relevant to embedding, but it does not provide … any scenario list showing coverage of panel-stack/lifecycle/failure-recovery.”

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The result.md is explicitly framed as a Phase 5b checkpoint enforcement evaluation and uses Phase 5b contract/rubric references, listing required Phase 5b outputs and validators (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b draft) and concluding it cannot be demonstrated due to missing Phase 5b artifacts. This aligns the output to the Phase 5b primary phase scope, even though artifacts are absent.
